sections.paragraph: fem. joy, gladness, Psa 4:8 45:16 , etc. שָׂמַח שִׂמְחָה גְּדֹולָה to be very joyful, 1Ki 1:40 Jon 4:6. Specially-(a) joyful voices, joyful cries, Gen 31:27 Nehem. 12:43 2Ch 23:18 29:30 .-(b) joyful banquets, pleasures (Bergnügungen, Luftbarkeiten). Pro 21:17, אֹהֵב שִׂמְחָה loving pleasures. עָשָׂה שִׂמְחָה Neh 8:12 12:27 2Ch 30:23.
